changeSet.author: openelis-virologylab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab Lab Technician'

changeSet.comment: Add VirologyLab Lab Technician role for sample reception and extraction

column.name: description
column.value: Handles sample reception, extraction, PCR, gel analysis, and library prep

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-virologylab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab Bioinformatician'

changeSet.comment: Add VirologyLab Bioinformatician role for QC assessment and data analysis

column.name: description
column.value: Performs QC assessments, bioanalyzer analysis, sequencing, and bioinformatics

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-virologylab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab Manager'

changeSet.comment: Add VirologyLab Manager role for laboratory supervision and approval

column.name: description
column.value: Supervises lab operations, reviews and approves sample processing results

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-virologylab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab PI'

changeSet.comment: Add VirologyLab PI role for research project management

column.name: description
column.value: Manages research projects, reviews analysis, controls data access

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-virologylab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab Data Manager'

changeSet.comment: Add VirologyLab Data Manager role for data management and repository submission

column.name: description
column.value: Manages data archival, exports, and repository submissions

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')
